第154天 / 共200天

Pandas进阶四：数据合并

一、merge合并

merge类似SQL的JOIN操作，根据一个或多个键将两个DataFrame合并。

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# 创建两个表
basic = pd.DataFrame({
    "code": ["600519","000858","002594","601318"],
    "name": ["茅台","五粮液","比亚迪","平安"],
    "industry": ["白酒","白酒","汽车","金融"],
})
price = pd.DataFrame({
    "code": ["600519","000858","002594","600036"],
    "close": [1850.50, 150.20, 305.80, 38.90],
    "change": [2.35, -1.50, 5.20, -0.30],
})

# 内连接(inner join) - 默认
result_inner = pd.merge(basic, price, on="code")
print("Inner Join:")
print(result_inner)

# 左连接(left join)
result_left = pd.merge(basic, price, on="code", how="left")
print("\nLeft Join:")
print(result_left)

# 右连接(right join)
result_right = pd.merge(basic, price, on="code", how="right")
print("\nRight Join:")
print(result_right)

# 全连接(outer join)
result_outer = pd.merge(basic, price, on="code", how="outer")
print("\nOuter Join:")
print(result_outer)

二、多键合并

# 多列作为合并键
daily = pd.DataFrame({
    "code": ["600519","600519","000858","000858"],
    "date": ["2024-01-02","2024-01-03","2024-01-02","2024-01-03"],
    "close": [1850, 1860, 150, 152],
})
indicator = pd.DataFrame({
    "code": ["600519","600519","000858","000858"],
    "date": ["2024-01-02","2024-01-03","2024-01-02","2024-01-03"],
    "ma5": [1830, 1840, 148, 149],
    "ma20": [1800, 1810, 145, 146],
})
merged = pd.merge(daily, indicator, on=["code","date"], how="inner")
print(merged)

# 不同列名合并
left = pd.DataFrame({"code": ["600519","000858"], "name": ["茅台","五粮液"]})
right = pd.DataFrame({"stock_code": ["600519","000858"], "pe": [35, 22]})
merged = pd.merge(left, right, left_on="code", right_on="stock_code")
print(merged)

三、concat拼接

# 纵向拼接(行合并)
df1 = pd.DataFrame({"code": ["600519","000858"], "close": [1850, 150]})
df2 = pd.DataFrame({"code": ["002594","601318"], "close": [305, 52]})
result = pd.concat([df1, df2], ignore_index=True)
print("纵向拼接:")
print(result)

# 横向拼接(列合并)
price_df = pd.DataFrame({"code": ["600519","000858"], "close": [1850, 150]})
pe_df = pd.DataFrame({"code": ["600519","000858"], "pe": [35.8, 22.5]})
result = pd.concat([price_df, pe_df.set_index("code")], axis=1)
print("\n横向拼接:")
print(result)

# 多个DataFrame合并
dfs = []
for code in ["600519","000858","002594"]:
    tmp = pd.DataFrame({
        "code": [code]*30,
        "close": np.random.uniform(50, 2000, 30),
    })
    dfs.append(tmp)
all_data = pd.concat(dfs, ignore_index=True)
print(f"\n合并后: {all_data.shape}")

四、join合并

# join基于索引合并
left = pd.DataFrame({"close": [1850, 150, 305]},
                      index=["600519","000858","002594"])
right = pd.DataFrame({"pe": [35.8, 22.5, 48.2]},
                       index=["600519","000858","002594"])

result = left.join(right)
print("Join:")
print(result)

# join的how参数
result_left = left.join(right, how="left")
result_outer = left.join(right, how="outer")

五、数据合并方式对比图

六、实战：合并多只股票数据

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# 模拟多只股票的独立数据
codes = ["600519","000858","002594","601318","600036"]
names = ["茅台","五粮液","比亚迪","平安","招行"]
industries = ["白酒","白酒","汽车","金融","金融"]

# 1. 基本面数据
basic = pd.DataFrame({
    "code": codes, "name": names, "industry": industries,
    "pe": [35.8, 22.5, 48.2, 7.5, 6.8],
    "pb": [10.2, 5.8, 7.5, 0.9, 1.1],
})

# 2. 每日行情数据
daily_records = []
for i, code in enumerate(codes):
    dates = pd.date_range("2024-01-01", periods=30, freq="B")
    for d in dates:
        daily_records.append({
            "code": code, "date": d,
            "close": round(np.random.uniform(30, 2000), 2),
            "volume": np.random.randint(100000, 10000000),
            "change": round(np.random.uniform(-5, 5), 2),
        })
daily = pd.DataFrame(daily_records)

# 3. 技术指标数据
latest = daily.drop_duplicates("code", keep="last")[["code","close","change"]]
latest["ma5"] = [round(np.random.uniform(30, 2000), 2) for _ in range(5)]
latest["ma20"] = [round(np.random.uniform(30, 2000), 2) for _ in range(5)]

# 合并所有数据
full = pd.merge(basic, latest, on="code", how="inner")
print("=== 合并后数据 ===")
print(full)

# 按行业聚合分析
industry_report = full.groupby("industry").agg({
    "pe": "mean", "pb": "mean",
    "close": "mean", "change": "mean",
}).round(2)
print("\n=== 行业分析 ===")
print(industry_report)

关键概念示意图一

核心知识点结构

学习要点总结

交互式测试

1. merge默认连接方式？
2. merge的how='left'效果？
3. concat的axis=1效果？
4. join基于什么合并？
5. merge的on参数？
6. left_on/right_on作用？
7. concat(ignore_index=True)？
8. merge多键用？
9. outer join效果？
10. merge后重复列怎么处理？
11. concat纵向要求？
12. join和merge最大区别？
13. suffixes参数作用？
14. validate参数作用？
15. concat可以合并不同列吗？
16. merge + indicator=True？
17. 纵向拼接3个DataFrame？
18. merge中how='cross'？
19. 横向拼接axis=1要求？

课后作业

课后作业 1

模拟3只股票各30天数据，用concat纵向合并，再与基本面数据用merge横向合并，生成完整分析表。

课后作业 2

用merge合并股票日行情和技术指标数据，分析金叉/死叉信号与实际涨跌的关系。

课后作业 3

编写函数merge_multi_stocks(stock_codes)，自动获取多只股票数据并用concat合并为统一格式的大表。

上一页返回总纲下一页
